description: Perform a Paired Samples T-Test on the Student's Sleep Study data from '~/Documents/Jamovi/SleepWide.csv' comparing 'Drug1' and 'Drug2'. The analysis should include Effect Size (Cohen's d), Descriptives, and the Shapiro-Wilk Normality Test. Save the Jamovi project to '~/Documents/Jamovi/SleepPairedTest.omv' and record the results in '~/Documents/Jamovi/paired_ttest_results.txt' using the 'key: value' format for the following statistics: t_statistic, df, p_value, mean_difference, cohens_d, and shapiro_wilk_p.
